title: University of Missouri School of Medicine expands Springfield clinical campus to full four-year program
title_cn: 密苏里大学医学院将斯普林菲尔德临床校区拓展为完整四年制办学项目

title: Where tradition meets innovation at Ellis Library
summary_en: Mizzou’s Digital Media and Innovation Lab gives students hands-on access to cutting-edge tools, transforming a historic space into a hub for digital-age learning.
title_cn: 埃利斯图书馆：传统与创新交汇之地

title: Wind in their ‘sales’: Trulaske students bring home honors in collegiate competitions
title_cn: 销售赛场表现优异：特鲁拉斯克学院学生在高校竞赛中斩获殊荣

title: Sterilizing surgical implants with neutrons could reduce infections
summary_en: Mizzou researchers have created a new way to kill bacteria that gets trapped within surgical implants.
title_cn: 利用中子对外科植入物灭菌可降低感染风险

title: Idea Jam gives students opportunity to collaborate, pitch proposal to enhance campus life
summary_en: Winning team pitched plan for another convenient grab-and-go dining option.
title_cn: “创意献策会”为学生提供协作契机 可提交优化校园生活提案
